name: Bar: clock plate hugs the clock
description: Shrinks the bar's clock plate to fit the clock width (time, optionally date) instead of the fixed-wider centerSideModule slot. Disable to get a roomier, fixed plate.
author: rom4ik

patches.find:
MouseArea {
            id: rightCenterGroup
            anchors.verticalCenter: parent.verticalCenter
            implicitWidth: root.centerSideModuleWidth
patches.replace:
MouseArea {
            id: rightCenterGroup
            anchors.verticalCenter: parent.verticalCenter
            implicitWidth: rightCenterGroupContent.implicitWidth
